summary.text: AI Agent frameworks are the dominant category today, with two projects showing sudden breakout acceleration. Front-End Checklist (72.9k stars, +28 stars in 24h, acceleration 4.9) gained attention after exposing its 385 rules via MCP for AI agents, signaling a shift toward agent-ready knowledge bases. CCMP (8.2k stars, acceleration 2.6) turns coding agents into structured project managers using GitHub Issues and parallel Git worktrees, indicating growing interest in multi-agent coordination. Meanwhile, netdata (79.1k stars, acceleration 3.3) and ml-engineering (18.1k stars, acceleration 3.3) show breakout in observability and training optimization respectively, suggesting developers are seeking infrastructure for agent deployment. The cross-source signal from DeepSeek-R1's open-source implementation on Hacker News (998 votes) reinforces the agent theme. The absence of new RAG or local LLM breakouts today may indicate attention is shifting from model capabilities to agent orchestration and tooling.

projects.name: Front-End-Checklist
projects.description: 🗂 The essential checklist for modern web development, for humans and AI agents

llmSummary.oneLiner: A comprehensive front-end quality checklist with 385 rules, now exposed via MCP for AI agents.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Provides a structured, actionable checklist of front-end best practices (HTML, CSS, JS, accessibility, performance, SEO, security, etc.) that both humans and AI agents can use to audit and improve web projects.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 72,871 stars and a sudden breakout acceleration of 2.3 (high), the project is experiencing a sharp uptick in attention. The 24h star delta of 18 and 7d delta of 82 indicate sustained interest, while the acceleration suggests a recent catalyst. The MCP server integration makes it immediately useful for AI agents, aligning with the current surge in agentic workflows.
llmSummary.whatChanged: The recent addition of an MCP server (mcp.frontendchecklist.io) and explicit AI agent support in the README, combined with a release within the last 30 days, likely drove the sudden breakout. The project also added skills for reusable audit workflows.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It bridges the gap between human-readable checklists and AI agent tooling, making it a practical resource for developers building or reviewing front-end code with AI assistance. The large rule corpus (385 rules) and MCP compatibility make it a go-to reference for automated code review.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: Integrate this checklist into your CI/CD or AI agent workflows to automate front-end quality checks. The MCP server allows agents to audit code, URLs, and fetch rules programmatically.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward structured, machine-readable best practices that AI agents can consume directly. Developers should expect more projects to expose rule sets via MCP or similar protocols, enabling automated, context-aware code review.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Front-end developers, web developers, QA engineers, and AI/agent developers building automated code review or audit tools.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The checklist is opinionated and may not cover all edge cases. Over-reliance on automated checks could miss context-specific issues. The project's sudden breakout may attract noise or unsustainable hype.

projects.description: The fastest path to AI-powered full stack observability, even for lean teams.

llmSummary.oneLiner: Netdata is an open-source, real-time infrastructure monitoring platform with per-second metrics, zero-configuration setup, and ML-powered anomaly detection.
llmSummary.problemSolved: It eliminates the complexity and cost of traditional monitoring by providing instant, high-resolution visibility into every metric across servers, containers, and applications without requiring extensive configuration or central data storage.
llmSummary.whyNow: Netdata is experiencing a sudden breakout with a 3.3x acceleration ratio and a 7-day average star delta of 8.3, totaling 79,120 stars. This acceleration suggests a recent surge in attention, likely driven by its AI-powered features and the growing need for efficient observability tools.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. However, the high acceleration and recent commits (within 7 days) suggest ongoing development and community engagement may be fueling the breakout.

Its energy efficiency and scalability make it a compelling alternative to heavier solutions like Prometheus.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: Netdata offers a drop-in monitoring solution that provides immediate, high-fidelity insights with minimal overhead. Developers can deploy it in minutes and gain deep visibility into their infrastructure without complex setup.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift toward lightweight, AI-augmented observability tools that prioritize ease of use and real-time data. For AI developers, Netdata's edge-based ML models demonstrate how to embed intelligence directly into monitoring pipelines without centralizing data.
llmSummary.targetUsers: DevOps engineers, SREs, system administrators, and developers managing Linux, macOS, FreeBSD, or Windows servers, containers, and Kubernetes clusters.

The README mentions integration with multiple AI harnesses, which may have expanded its reach.
llmSummary.whyTrending: CCPM addresses a critical pain point in AI-assisted coding: context loss and lack of structured project management. Its promise of parallel agent execution and full traceability resonates with developers moving from 'vibe coding' to production-grade AI workflows. The Agent Skills compatibility lowers adoption friction.

Developers can adopt it to improve code quality, reduce context switching, and enable team collaboration with AI agents. It's particularly valuable for teams using Claude Code, Codex, or similar tools.
llmSummary.developerInsight: This signals a shift from ad-hoc AI coding to disciplined, spec-driven development. The emphasis on 'no vibe coding' and full traceability suggests that the next frontier for AI coding tools is not just code generation but project management and accountability. Developers should watch for similar patterns in other tools.

projects.name: DeepSpeed
projects.description: DeepSpeed is a deep learning optimization library that makes distributed training and inference easy, efficient, and effective.

llmSummary.oneLiner: DeepSpeed is a deep learning optimization library for distributed training and inference, enabling efficient scaling to trillion-parameter models.
llmSummary.problemSolved: Training and inference of large-scale deep learning models is memory and compute intensive, often exceeding single GPU capacity. DeepSpeed provides system innovations like ZeRO, 3D parallelism, and MoE to reduce memory footprint, improve throughput, and simplify distributed training.
llmSummary.whyNow: With 42,497 stars and a steady 7-day average of 6.1 stars/day, DeepSpeed remains a foundational tool for large model training. The recent acceleration (2.5x) and sudden breakout signal suggest renewed interest, likely driven by new features like Muon optimizer support, SDMA for AMD GPUs, and SuperOffload for superchips. The project has a recent release and active commits, indicating ongoing innovation.
llmSummary.whatChanged: Recent blog posts and releases highlight Muon optimizer integration, SDMA for AMD GPUs, and SuperOffload for Apple M-series chips. These features expand DeepSpeed's applicability to new hardware and optimization techniques, likely driving the uptick in attention.
llmSummary.whyTrending: DeepSpeed is a critical infrastructure for training large models, and its continuous addition of cutting-edge optimizations (e.g., ZeRO++, DeepCompile, ZenFlow) keeps it relevant. The ASPLOS 2026 tutorial and best paper award further validate its academic and industry impact.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: DeepSpeed is essential for anyone training or deploying large models (1B+ parameters). Its integration with Hugging Face Transformers, PyTorch Lightning, and other frameworks makes it accessible. Developers should evaluate its ZeRO stages, MoE, and offloading capabilities to reduce costs and scale efficiently.
llmSummary.developerInsight: DeepSpeed's trajectory signals that efficient distributed training is a key competitive advantage. The focus on heterogeneous hardware (AMD, Intel, Apple) and new optimizers (Muon) indicates a shift toward hardware-aware optimization and memory-efficient training, which will be critical as model sizes grow.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Machine learning engineers and researchers training large language models, MoE models, or long-context models; teams deploying inference at scale; developers working with PyTorch on multi-GPU or multi-node setups.
llmSummary.riskNotes: DeepSpeed's complexity can be a barrier for newcomers. Some features (e.g., custom CUDA ops) require specific hardware and may not work on all platforms. The project is heavily Microsoft-backed, which could affect long-term governance if priorities shift.

llmSummary.oneLiner: A production-grade pack of 24 structured skills and slash commands that encode senior engineering workflows for AI coding agents.
llmSummary.problemSolved: AI coding agents often produce inconsistent, low-quality output because they lack the structured workflows, quality gates, and best practices that senior engineers follow. This repository packages those practices into reusable, agent-executable skills.
llmSummary.whyNow: The repo has exploded from 0 to 51,894 stars with a 24h delta of 2,051 and a 7d delta of 3,844. The acceleration ratio is 4 (high), indicating a sudden breakout. This is not gradual growth — it's a viral spike driven by the release of a comprehensive, well-documented skill pack for multiple agent platforms.
llmSummary.whatChanged: The repository was created recently and has seen a rapid initial burst of stars. The README describes a full set of 24 skills and 7 slash commands, with setup instructions for Claude Code, Cursor, Antigravity, Gemini CLI, Windsurf, OpenCode, GitHub Copilot, Kiro, and Codex. The sudden breakout suggests a launch announcement or viral social media post by the author (Addy Osmani, a well-known Google Chrome engineer) or coverage on Hacker News / Twitter.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It directly addresses a pain point for developers using AI coding agents: inconsistent output quality. By providing ready-made, production-grade skills that work across multiple agent platforms, it lowers the barrier to adopting structured agent workflows. The author's reputation and the comprehensive documentation accelerate adoption.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: This is a practical, immediately usable resource for any developer using AI coding agents. You can install it in minutes and get consistent, senior-engineer-level behavior from your agent across the entire development lifecycle.
llmSummary.developerInsight: The project signals a shift from ad-hoc agent prompting to structured, skill-based agent programming. It suggests that the future of AI-assisted development lies in reusable, verifiable skill packs rather than raw LLM prompts. Developers should consider adopting or contributing to such skill ecosystems.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Developers and teams using AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Copilot, etc.) who want to enforce consistent, high-quality engineering practices without manual prompting.
llmSummary.riskNotes: The skills are opinionated and may not fit every team's workflow. Over-reliance on predefined skills could reduce flexibility. The project is very new (no release history), so long-term maintenance and community adoption are unproven.

llmSummary.whyNow: The repo has 13,158 stars and gained 798 stars in the last 24 hours, indicating strong and sustained attention. The acceleration ratio is 1 (low), meaning growth is steady rather than explosive, but the consistent high velocity suggests deep community interest. This is not a flash-in-the-pan; it's a project with staying power.
llmSummary.whatChanged: No single obvious trigger — the project appears to be sustaining organic growth. The recent release (within 30 days) and active commits (within 7 days) show ongoing maintenance, but the star velocity is likely driven by word-of-mouth and the growing need for structured AI workflows in product management.
llmSummary.whyTrending: It addresses a clear pain point: product managers want AI that understands their domain, not just a chatbot. The marketplace model (skills, commands, plugins) is easy to adopt, and the integration with Claude Code and Cowork lowers the barrier. The MIT license and PR-friendly culture encourage community contributions.
llmSummary.developerTakeaway: This is a blueprint for building domain-specific AI skill marketplaces. Developers can learn how to structure skills, commands, and plugins for other verticals (e.g., marketing, engineering, design) and see how to make them compatible with multiple AI assistants.
llmSummary.developerInsight: The project signals a shift from general-purpose AI to specialized, framework-driven agents. For AI developers, this means investing in domain-specific skill repositories could be a high-impact strategy. The plugin architecture is portable across assistants, reducing lock-in risk.
llmSummary.targetUsers: Product managers, AI assistant power users, developers building AI workflows, and anyone using Claude Code, Cowork, Codex CLI, or other AI tools for product development.
llmSummary.riskNotes: Heavy reliance on Claude-specific commands may limit adoption on other platforms. The quality of skills depends on community contributions, which could vary. Also, the project is young and may not have long-term maintenance guarantees.

aihotHighlights.title: Cursor 推出 Auto-review 机制：用分类器智能体动态管控智能体自主权限
aihotHighlights.summary: Cursor 近日推出 Auto-review，通过一个专门的分类器智能体在工具调用前审查动作风险。该分类器根据上下文判断动作是否与用户意图一致，高风险时阻止并返回解释给父智能体，低风险时放行。分类器采用小模型，运行在智能体循环内以避免额外延迟，并能读取工作区文件辅助判断。测试基于约12小时内部开发会话生成的6122条标签数据，以及针对读取密钥、操作生产数据等危险场景的合成数据。设计目标是在不频繁阻断日常开发的前提下，拦截风险动作。

items.title: Anthropic与DXC达成全球联盟，将Claude引入关键行业系统
items.description: Anthropic与IT服务公司DXC Technology达成多年全球联盟。DXC将培训数万名获得Claude认证的前沿部署工程师（FDE），将Claude引入其为全球大型银行、航空公司、保险公司及政府机构运营的关键系统。内部部署中，Claude已成为DXC OASIS平台的默认基础模型，该平台超95%代码由Claude编写，开发速度提升10倍，已服务50多家客户。DXC加入Claude Partner Network，将在保险、现代化服务、网络安全及应用服务四个领域率先推出基于Claude的解决方案。

items.title: Prometheus 融资120亿美元，估值410亿美元，定位"人工通用工程师"
items.description: 杰夫·贝佐斯旗下AI公司Prometheus在成立仅7个月、尚无任何产品交付的情况下，以410亿美元估值完成120亿美元融资（最初估值62亿美元）。该公司定位为"人工通用工程师"，目标是将设计到制造的循环压缩10倍以上。但物理经济无法像互联网数据那样抓取，缺乏制造业训练数据。为此，Prometheus计划斥资1000亿美元收购传统工业企业，通过获取工厂生成的数据构建护城河。

items.title: Anthropic与DXC达成全球联盟，将Claude引入关键行业系统
items.description: Anthropic与IT服务公司DXC Technology达成多年全球联盟。DXC将培训数万名获得Claude认证的前沿部署工程师（FDE），将Claude引入其为全球大型银行、航空公司、保险公司及政府机构运营的关键系统。内部部署中，Claude已成为DXC OASIS平台的默认基础模型，该平台超95%代码由Claude编写，开发速度提升10倍，已服务50多家客户。DXC加入Claude Partner Network，将在保险、现代化服务、网络安全及应用服务四个领域率先推出基于Claude的解决方案。

trendEntities.title: Anthropic与DXC达成全球联盟，将Claude引入关键行业系统
normalizedKeys: title:anthropic与dxc达成全球联盟 将claude引入关键行业系统

items.title: Anthropic与DXC达成全球联盟，将Claude引入关键行业系统
items.summary: Anthropic与IT服务公司DXC Technology达成多年全球联盟。DXC将培训数万名获得Claude认证的前沿部署工程师（FDE），将Claude引入其为全球大型银行、航空公司、保险公司及政府机构运营的关键系统。内部部署中，Claude已成为DXC OASIS平台的默认基础模型，该平台超95%代码由Claude编写，开发速度提升10倍，已服务50多家客户。DXC加入Claude Partner Network，将在保险、现代化服务、网络安全及应用服务四个领域率先推出基于Claude的解决方案。

items.title: Prometheus 融资120亿美元，估值410亿美元，定位"人工通用工程师"
items.summary: 杰夫·贝佐斯旗下AI公司Prometheus在成立仅7个月、尚无任何产品交付的情况下，以410亿美元估值完成120亿美元融资（最初估值62亿美元）。该公司定位为"人工通用工程师"，目标是将设计到制造的循环压缩10倍以上。但物理经济无法像互联网数据那样抓取，缺乏制造业训练数据。为此，Prometheus计划斥资1000亿美元收购传统工业企业，通过获取工厂生成的数据构建护城河。

trendEntities.title: Runway与Lionsgate扩大战略合作

items.title: Runway与Lionsgate扩大战略合作
items.summary: 全球内容巨头Lionsgate与生成式AI研究公司Runway今日宣布扩大战略合作。Lionsgate已取得Runway股权，双方将启动联合开发项目，共同创作并制作新IP，首推一部基于Lionsgate现有IP和Runway生成模型的短剧系列。此外，Lionsgate将作为主持伙伴参与6月举行的Runway AI电影节。这是双方继2024年9月首次合作后的深化，Lionsgate此前已在预可视化、故事板及最终帧制作中应用Runway工具。

normalizedKeys: title:anthropic 启动 claude corps 全国奖学金项目

items.title: Anthropic 启动 Claude Corps 全国奖学金项目
items.summary: Anthropic 推出 Claude Corps 奖学金项目，面向早期职业生涯的年轻人，培训 1，000 名研究员使用 Claude，并匹配给美国非营利组织全职工作一年。研究员年薪 85，000 美元及福利，每周接受 5 小时持续培训。Anthropic 初始投入 1.5 亿美元，合作方为 CodePath 和 Social Finance。至少 400 家非营利组织将参与接待，包括 Braven、Code the Dream、Heartland Forward 等。

items.title: Cursor 推出 Auto-review 机制：用分类器智能体动态管控智能体自主权限
items.summary: Cursor 近日推出 Auto-review，通过一个专门的分类器智能体在工具调用前审查动作风险。该分类器根据上下文判断动作是否与用户意图一致，高风险时阻止并返回解释给父智能体，低风险时放行。分类器采用小模型，运行在智能体循环内以避免额外延迟，并能读取工作区文件辅助判断。测试基于约12小时内部开发会话生成的6122条标签数据，以及针对读取密钥、操作生产数据等危险场景的合成数据。设计目标是在不频繁阻断日常开发的前提下，拦截风险动作。

items.summary: 阿里云今日推出 Meoo（秒悟）开源命令行工具 Meoo CLI，面向开发者，支持 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 等本地 AI 编程助手。通过调用阿里云云端能力，可自动完成数据库接入、用户登录、文件存储及项目发布，将本地项目一键部署上线并生成可分享的访问链接。该工具定位为本地 Agent 与秒悟云端能力的连接入口，已开放下载，支持主流 Linux、macOS 及 Windows 平台。

normalizedKeys: title:千问推出首个足球预测ai助手 竞猜赢奖并捐建球场

items.title: 千问推出首个足球预测AI助手，竞猜赢奖并捐建球场
items.summary: 千问上线首个足球预测AI助手，基于海量大数据（含历史比赛、球员数据、伤病、美加墨地貌及天气等）。以6月22日挪威对塞内加尔为例，预测"1：1平局"，理由为气候差异。活动：参与全部104场竞猜，预测超80场且准确率超千问可抽万元大奖（100个名额）；预测超32场可抽千问AI眼镜G1（1000副），该眼镜支持赛后分析、拍屏识球员及赛事结果订阅。累积积分将向乡村学校捐建足球场，目标至少50所。

trendEntities.title: 腾讯混元 AI Infra 新开源：HPC-Ops 推理核心算子全面升级
normalizedKeys: title:腾讯混元 ai infra 新开源 hpc ops 推理核心算子全面升级

items.title: 腾讯混元 AI Infra 新开源：HPC-Ops 推理核心算子全面升级
items.summary: 腾讯混元 AI Infra 团队开源升级 HPC-Ops 推理算子库，推出五大核心算子。Attention 采用运行时动态负载调度，长文本最高加速 2.95x，端到端 QPM 提升 17%；Router GEMM 以双 BF16 组合实现 FP32 精度，对比 CuBLAS FP32 最高提速 3.22x；FusedMoE 相对 vLLM、SGLang 性能提升 1.2x~1.6x；Fused AllReduce+Norm 对比主流方案最高提速 1.68x；Sampler 将解码采样融合为 2 个 CUDA Kernel，相对 vLLM 提速 4.0x~7.5x。所有能力均来自生产实践并完全开源。

trendEntities.title: Deezer 推出面向其他流媒体服务的 AI 音乐检测器
normalizedKeys: title:deezer 推出面向其他流媒体服务的 ai 音乐检测器

items.title: Deezer 推出面向其他流媒体服务的 AI 音乐检测器
items.summary: Deezer 将扫描用户在其它流媒体平台的播放列表，检测其中的 AI 生成音乐。Deezer 是最早标记 AI 生成音乐的大型流媒体服务之一，曾向其他平台提供该技术但少有采纳。Deezer CEO Alexis Lanternier 表示，由于没有其他公司跟进，他们决定让用户无论使用哪个平台，都能检查自己的播放列表中是否包含合成音乐。

items.title: baoyu-design skill 更新：支持导入 Figma 本地文件重建设计系统
items.summary: baoyu-design skill 更新，现已支持导入 Figma 本地文件（.fig），可在本地重建设计系统，效果与 Claude Design 在线版一致。该功能依赖 Claude Fable 5 辅助（Token 不够用）。安装后提供 Figma 文件路径即可导入为 Design System，后续新建设计项目可复用。同时支持在新建项目时添加已导入的 Design System，保留了 Claude Design 原始的导入和编译方式，用户可通过提问选择设计系统。安装命令：`npx skills add JimLiu/baoyu-design`。项目地址：https：//github.com/jimliu/baoyu-design。

trendEntities.title: Anthropic CEO 阿莫迪：AI 可能会造成大规模、长期性的岗位流失
normalizedKeys: title:anthropic ceo 阿莫迪 ai 可能会造成大规模 长期性的岗位流失

items.title: Anthropic CEO 阿莫迪：AI 可能会造成大规模、长期性的岗位流失
items.summary: Anthropic CEO 达里奥・阿莫迪警告，AI造成的大规模岗位流失是技术固有属性--AI系统旨在复刻人类认知，失业将成为结构性必然结果。他提出应对思路：完善劳动力市场监测、推行薪资保障与留岗税收优惠、发放培训补贴；若人力需求永久下降，则需通过征税推行全民基本收入等长期收入保障。Anthropic目标非削减人力成本，而是帮企业开拓新营收、盘活现有员工产能。

trendEntities.title: 从0到1速通WorkBuddy：国内通用Agent产品教程
normalizedKeys: title:从0到1速通workbuddy 国内通用agent产品教程

items.title: 从0到1速通WorkBuddy：国内通用Agent产品教程
items.summary: WorkBuddy是面向国内用户的通用Agent产品，支持Windows和Mac，提供免费版和58元/月个人专业版，企业版已推出。内置代码开发、日常办公、设计创意三种场景模式及100多个行业领域AI专家。模型集成腾讯混元、DeepSeek（推荐V4 Pro）、GLM、Kimi等国产大模型，也支持接入兼容OpenAI协议的外部API。拥有Skills市场和MCP连接器生态，可打通QQ邮箱、腾讯会议、腾讯文档等服务。教程通过公众号周报生成和功能网页开发两个案例演示实际用法。

items.title: mlx-vlm v0.6.3 发布，Day-0 支持 Google DeepMind DiffusionGemma 和 Cohere North Mini Code 1.0
items.summary: mlx-vlm v0.6.3 上线，首发支持 DiffusionGemma 和 North Mini Code 1.0。DiffusionGemma 采用全新架构：以 256 token 块为单位并行生成、双向注意力、迭代自纠错；26B MoE 仅激活 3.8B，量化后 18GB 即可运行。North Mini Code 1.0 为 30B MoE，仅激活 3B，BF16 下约 66 tok/s。两款模型均通过深度合作实现 Day-0 MLX 支持，可在 Mac 本地运行。可通过 `uv pip install -U mlx-vlm` 安装体验。

items.title: 腾讯混元 AI Infra 新开源：HPC-Ops 推理核心算子全面升级
items.summary: 腾讯混元 AI Infra 团队开源升级 HPC-Ops 推理算子库，推出五大核心算子。Attention 采用运行时动态负载调度，长文本最高加速 2.95x，端到端 QPM 提升 17%；Router GEMM 以双 BF16 组合实现 FP32 精度，对比 CuBLAS FP32 最高提速 3.22x；FusedMoE 相对 vLLM、SGLang 性能提升 1.2x~1.6x；Fused AllReduce+Norm 对比主流方案最高提速 1.68x；Sampler 将解码采样融合为 2 个 CUDA Kernel，相对 vLLM 提速 4.0x~7.5x。所有能力均来自生产实践并完全开源。

sourceItems.summary: 腾讯混元 AI Infra 团队开源升级 HPC-Ops 推理算子库，推出五大核心算子。Attention 采用运行时动态负载调度，长文本最高加速 2.95x，端到端 QPM 提升 17%；Router GEMM 以双 BF16 组合实现 FP32 精度，对比 CuBLAS FP32 最高提速 3.22x；FusedMoE 相对 vLLM、SGLang 性能提升 1.2x~1.6x；Fused AllReduce+Norm 对比主流方案最高提速 1.68x；Sampler 将解码采样融合为 2 个 CUDA Kernel，相对 vLLM 提速 4.0x~7.5x。所有能力均来自生产实践并完全开源。

items.title: Cursor 推出 Auto-review 机制：用分类器智能体动态管控智能体自主权限
items.summary: Cursor 近日推出 Auto-review，通过一个专门的分类器智能体在工具调用前审查动作风险。该分类器根据上下文判断动作是否与用户意图一致，高风险时阻止并返回解释给父智能体，低风险时放行。分类器采用小模型，运行在智能体循环内以避免额外延迟，并能读取工作区文件辅助判断。测试基于约12小时内部开发会话生成的6122条标签数据，以及针对读取密钥、操作生产数据等危险场景的合成数据。设计目标是在不频繁阻断日常开发的前提下，拦截风险动作。

items.title: 腾讯混元 AI Infra 新开源：HPC-Ops 推理核心算子全面升级
items.summary: 腾讯混元 AI Infra 团队开源升级 HPC-Ops 推理算子库，推出五大核心算子。Attention 采用运行时动态负载调度，长文本最高加速 2.95x，端到端 QPM 提升 17%；Router GEMM 以双 BF16 组合实现 FP32 精度，对比 CuBLAS FP32 最高提速 3.22x；FusedMoE 相对 vLLM、SGLang 性能提升 1.2x~1.6x；Fused AllReduce+Norm 对比主流方案最高提速 1.68x；Sampler 将解码采样融合为 2 个 CUDA Kernel，相对 vLLM 提速 4.0x~7.5x。所有能力均来自生产实践并完全开源。
